Metadata.title: Brika - Self-hosted Automation Hub
Metadata.description: Build, run, and integrate automations locally. One binary. No cloud. Full control.

Hero.tagline: A self-hosted automation hub that runs on your machine. One binary, no cloud, full control.

QuickStart.heading: Quick Start
QuickStart.subheading: Install Brika in seconds. One command, no dependencies.

unix.label: macOS / Linux
unix.commentStable: # One command. No sudo. No dependencies.

docker.label: Docker
docker.commentCanary: # Run latest canary build from GHCR.
docker.note: Docker 20+ · Exposes on port {port} · Works on any OS

Features.heading: Why Brika
Features.subheading: Everything runs locally. You own the data, the plugins, the infra.

reactiveBlocks.title: Reactive blocks
reactiveBlocks.description: Type-safe workflow blocks powered by Zod and reactive streams. Full inference, zero boilerplate.

isolatedPlugins.title: Isolated plugins
isolatedPlugins.description: Every plugin runs in its own process. Crash isolation, binary IPC, hot-reload out of the box.

visualEditor.title: Visual editor
visualEditor.description: Drag-and-drop automation builder in your browser. Connect blocks, configure flows, see results live.

Bricks.heading: Your dashboard, your data
Bricks.subheading: Bricks are live dashboard cards that plugins provide. Weather, timers, device controls, music. Each brick displays real-time data and actions on a customizable grid.
Bricks.hint: Try dragging the cards to rearrange them.

Plugins.badge: {count, plural, one {# plugin available} other {# plugins available}}
Plugins.heading: Extend with plugins
Plugins.subheading: Discover community and official plugins from the npm registry.
Plugins.buildYourOwnDescription: Scaffold a plugin in one command. Define blocks, bricks, and integrations with full TypeScript inference. Ship as an npm package. Brika handles isolation, IPC, and hot-reload.

OpenSource.heading: Built in the open
OpenSource.description: Brika is MIT-licensed and open source. Read the code, fork it, contribute. It’s yours.
